sprint: Unified Layer Ordering — Full Merge When There's No Frame/Holder Pipeline
task: Same-day follow-up: the per-bucket fix in the previous entry still left a live 'My shapes' World broken -- a screenshot showed the Sticker's Card Designer Order buttons still doing nothing, Object Strip drag still not reordering, and 'I was able to move the builder background but not the shape (First BG).' Root cause, confirmed via a direct diagnostic: convergeSceneLayer's bucket-assignment heuristic (isFullBleed, meant for an unrelated Hosted-by-Scene wall-vs-foreground concern) puts a realistically-margined Shape into 'overlay' while a true full-bleed background lands in 'slide' -- two different buckets, so the two Shapes could never be dragged onto each other, and the lone Sticker (in the separate 'story' bucket) could never move relative to either. Fixed by recognizing that a page with no Frame/Holder pipeline at all (a Scene converged with zero Places, or a Quote composition) never runs the Frame/Panel drawing branch, so 'frame'/'holder'/'element' Layer Pack targets are never touched there -- 'slide'/'overlay' Layer Pack objects and every Scene element/Sticker are the ONLY things such a page draws, with nothing else whose order depends on Frame/Panel geometry. A new _noFramePipeline flag in renderer/slideRenderer.js's render() switches into a genuinely merged mode for exactly this case: the previously-unconditional bulk 'slide'/'overlay' _renderLayers calls are both skipped, and every such Layer Pack entry joins the Scene-element/Sticker natural order as ONE combined, freely-reorderable list, drawn via a new LayerEngine.renderOne(layer,rect,helpers) (js/layerEngine.js, extracted from render()'s existing per-layer body -- never a second drawing implementation) exposed as _renderOneLayer. A page WITH a real Frame/Holder (Museum Gallery and every other existing theme) is completely unaffected -- the exact previously-shipped 3-bucket behaviour runs unchanged there. getReorderableIds()/getReorderBucket() gained a _lastRenderWasMerged check so a merged-pass page reports one 'merged' bucket read directly off _lastSceneElements's own resolved order. Verified via a new Playwright reproduction rebuilding the exact reported page (a full-bleed 'slide' background, a margin-inset shape that genuinely converges to 'overlay', and a Sticker, on a zero-Holder Layout): all three objects now share one merged bucket; the Sticker's real 'Back' button now moves it behind BOTH shapes; a real Object Strip drag actually swaps the two Shapes' resolved order; a direct pixel sample at the canvas center confirms the real paint order changed, not just id bookkeeping. Full regression across the entire existing Creator/Builder/Card-Platform Playwright suite (21 scripts) and both goldenBuild.js suites passes unchanged, zero console errors. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
